title: Buff Plushies
description: Its a mod that give you some plushies that can give you buffs and help you in your survival world
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe5469eb343da2ebbcb0ee8714ef07f6a80aca9.png)

# Plushies Types

![The Plushies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/681dbe404aa63e15d30d5332283bff22f37fc7e3.png)

- Gardener Plushie

    Can grow nearby trees by time every random time there is a chance that the trees around it grow in range of 7 blocks

![Gardener Plushie Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51ee02ece988a662f203b605b6147c68903ddf32.png)

- Scarecrow Plushie

Can grow nearby crops by time every random time there is a chance that the crops around it grow in range of 7 blocks

![Scarecrow Plushie Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f2496be8b638ff87d02ed189384807416a6ce66.png)

- Fisherman Plushie
  
Can give nearby players boosted fishing luck in range of 10 blocks

  ![Fisherman Plushie Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4283d4f1227d5c0ac252173759b41bd90f8b9537.png)

-   Snowman Plushie
  
Can spawn snow on nearby blocks in range of 7 blocks and if the block is water it will turn it into ice

![Snowman Plushie Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b72799a83b0b9f8b1faee70f6de3ec0fbc612110.png)

More plushies and more verisons of mc will be added in the next update!
